_metadata.extraction: per-line (each ORDER disposition line's own grant/deny + own inline upstream; FINDING-of-fact fallback only for single-disposition decisions)
_metadata.outcome: per-issue grant/deny read from the ORDER disposition line; clean grant vs deny only (partial/remanded/dismissed/granted-in-part dropped); multi-issue decisions excluded
_metadata.notes: win_pct == grant_pct (no 'partial' bucket in the isolated atlas). Rank on 'directionality' (log-odds vs reverse) among MECHANISM-ELIGIBLE anchors; level is shrunk_grant_pct. imo_win_pct/imo_grant_pct NULL when imo_n==0.
_metadata.consumer_contract: Iterate ONLY json['pairs']. Per-pair fields preserve the legacy contract (n, tier, win_pct, grant_pct, imo_n, imo_win_pct, imo_grant_pct, n_secondary, n_aggravation); tier in {high,moderate,low} (consumer stamps 'novel' for absent). imo_n==0 => imo_win_pct null.
